fayshalToJuthy.content:
My dearest Juthy,

Nine years ago, I had no idea that a simple meeting would change the entire course of my life. You walked into my world with a smile that still lights up my darkest days, and from that moment, everything became more beautiful.

We've grown together — through laughter and tears, through celebrations and challenges. You've taught me what it means to love without conditions, to be patient, and to believe in us even when the path wasn't clear.

Every memory we've created is a treasure I hold close to my heart. The quiet mornings, the adventurous trips, the family gatherings, and even the difficult conversations that made us stronger.

As we stand on the threshold of forever, I want you to know that choosing you was the best decision I ever made. I promise to love you, respect you, and stand by you through every season of life.

Forever yours,
Fayshal

juthyToFayshal.content:
My beloved Fayshal,

When I think about our journey, my heart fills with gratitude. You came into my life when I least expected it, and you stayed when you had every reason to leave. That is the kind of love legends are made of.

You've been my anchor in stormy seas, my laughter on ordinary days, and my partner in every dream I've dared to chase. With you, I've learned that love isn't perfect — it's perfectly real.

Nine years of memories, and yet it feels like we're just getting started. I cherish every moment — from our first awkward conversation to planning our wedding together.

Thank you for seeing me, for choosing me, and for building this beautiful life with me. I cannot wait to call you my husband and to write the next chapters of our story together.

With all my love,
Juthy
